Packet 1 — Clear Positive (Experimentation is a primary driver)

OPPORTUNITY SNAPSHOT
- EIC ID (if updating):
- Account: Northwind Retail
- Opportunity: Northwind - Platform Consolidation FY26
- Opportunity Link: https://salesforce/oppty/001
- Stage: 4 - EB Approval
- Stage Bucket: Late
- Motion: Net-new
- AE Owner: Alex Rivera
- Experimentation Team Engaged?: Yes
- AI Configs Adjacent?: No
- Competitive Mention?: Yes (Statsig)
- Exec Sponsor Mentioned?: Yes (VP Digital)
- Next Checkpoint: 2026-03-24

EVIDENCE
1) Source Type: Gong
  Source Link: https://gong/call/abc
  Timestamp: 00:18:42
  Snippet: "We’re choosing between you and Statsig. The deciding factor is whether experimentation is built-in and governed alongside feature release."

2) Source Type: Gong
  Source Link: https://gong/call/abc
  Timestamp: 00:31:05
  Snippet: "If experimentation is a first-class capability in the platform, we can standardize on LaunchDarkhis quarter."

NOTES
- Close window: <30 days
- AE dispute: None

Packet 2 — Strong Positive (Material differentiator, not sole driver)

NOTES
